title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 167.111 - Officials to enforce compulsory attendance law
text:
167.111.  Officials to enforce compulsory attendance law. — The state commissioner of education, superintendents of schools, school boards, county superintendents of public welfare, and every school attendance and probation officer shall enforce all laws relating to compulsory school attendance.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 8-11, A.L. 1977 H.B. 130) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 164.090)
